race.comment: UNSTOPABULL (9) extended his win drought last time out when runner-up over 1300m at Warwick Farm, getting home with the gusto from near the tail hen the field straightened. Been up for a long while so probably has no more to offer but on recent efforts will be highly competitive again. LITTLE BEGINNINGS (1) has been safely held in his two runs this prep in Saturday grade. Not too badly treated after the claim and will be ready to find some form at the third run back. MOTHER GOOSE (6) is another who has been easily accounted for this time in work against better opposition. Races well here and should be ready to produce again. The consistent ASTRONOMIX (15) returned in good order at Warwick Farm recently and is ready for a first try at today's trip. STEEL STRIKE (5) has been gelded and returns from a 24-week spell. Raced well in similar contests last prep and the recent transformation may add that length or two required.
